subcodes.first_line: O Lion of the thicket of the Kingdom of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name - may my spirit be a sacrifice for His loved ones - make thou mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ضرغام اجمه ملکوت جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه فدا در جمیع اوقات ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
